PowerShell($edge = 'C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe'; $chrome = 'C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe'; $bin = if \(Test-Path $edge\) { $edge } elseif \(Test-Path $chrome\) { $chrome } else { $null }; if \($bin\) { $out='C:\\Users\\Administrator\\Desktop\\Bankrolly-pages\\preview-home.png'; & $bin --headless=new --disable-gpu --hide-scrollbars --window-size=1366,2600 "--screenshot=$out" 'http://localhost:4321/' 2>$null | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; if \(Test-Path $out\) { "OK $\(\(Get-Item $out\).Length\) bytes via $bin" } else { "NO SCREENSHOT" } } else { "NO BROWSER FOUND" })

PowerShell($f='C:\\Users\\Administrator\\Desktop\\Pokerapp\\Bankrolly_Reel_EN_v2.mp4'; if \(Test-Path $f\) { $size=\(Get-Item $f\).Length; "Size: $\([math]::Round\($size/1MB,2\)\) MB \($size bytes\)"; try { $sh=New-Object -ComObject Shell.Application; $dir=$sh.Namespace\(\(Split-Path $f\)\); $item=$dir.ParseName\(\(Split-Path $f -Leaf\)\); "Dimensions: $\($dir.GetDetailsOf\($item,316\)\)"; "Length: $\($dir.GetDetailsOf\($item,27\)\)" } catch { "no metadata" } } else { "FILE NOT FOUND" })
